title: Koanophyllon dolphini
taxonomy: Koanophyllon dolphini is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, which is commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It belongs to the genus Koanophyllon, which includes several species of tropical plants. The plant is native to the tropical regions of the Americas, including Central and South America. Koanophyllon dolphini is a relatively understudied species, and more research is needed to fully understand its classification and relationships to other plants. Further research into the plant's morphology and genetic characteristics may provide more insight into its classification within the Asteraceae family.
